ns0:entry.ns0:title: AI4Finance-Foundation/FinGPT
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AI4Finance-Foundation/FinGPT
Language: jupyter-notebook
FinGPT: Open-Source Financial Large Language Models! Revolutionize 🔥 We release the trained model on HuggingFace.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataExpert-io/data-engineer-handbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataExpert-io/data-engineer-handbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
This is a repo with links to everything you'd ever want to learn about data engineering

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GokuMohandas/Made-With-ML
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GokuMohandas/Made-With-ML
Language: jupyter-notebook
Learn how to develop, deploy and iterate on production-grade ML applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lordog/dive-into-llms
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lordog/dive-into-llms
Language: jupyter-notebook

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/GenerativeAIExamples
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/GenerativeAIExamples
Language: jupyter-notebook
Generative AI reference workflows optimized for accelerated infrastructure and microservice architecture.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NirDiamant/RAG_Techniques
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NirDiamant/RAG_Techniques
Language: jupyter-notebook
This repository showcases various advanced techniques for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. Each technique has a detailed notebook tutorial.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PacktPublishing/30-Agents-Every-AI-Engineer-Must-Build
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PacktPublishing/30-Agents-Every-AI-Engineer-Must-Build
Language: jupyter-notebook
30 Agents Every AI Engineer Must Build, published by Packt

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QwenLM/Qwen3-Omni
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3-Omni
Language: jupyter-notebook
Qwen3-omni is a natively end-to-end, omni-modal LLM developed by the Qwen team at Alibaba Cloud, capable of understanding text, audio, images, and video, as well as generating speech in real time.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: crewAIInc/crewAI-examples
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/crewAIInc/crewAI-examples
Language: jupyter-notebook
A collection of examples that show how to use CrewAI framework to automate workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-research/google-research
Language: jupyter-notebook

Language: jupyter-notebook

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/huggingface/notebooks

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/ML-For-Beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/CLIP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/CLIP
Language: jupyter-notebook
CLIP (Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining), Predict the most relevant text snippet given an image

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oracle-devrel/oracle-ai-developer-hub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oracle-devrel/oracle-ai-developer-hub
Language: jupyter-notebook
Technical resources for AI developers to build applications, agents, and systems using Oracle AI Database and OCI services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: poppy-project/poppy-humanoid
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/poppy-project/poppy-humanoid
Language: jupyter-notebook
Poppy Humanoid is an open-source and 3D printed humanoid robot. Optimized for research and education purposes, its modularity allows for a wide range of applications and experimentations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rasbt/LLMs-from-scratch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rasbt/LLMs-from-scratch
Language: jupyter-notebook
Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step

ns0:entry.ns0:title: udlbook/udlbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/udlbook/udlbook
Language: jupyter-notebook

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unslothai/notebooks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unslothai/notebooks
Language: jupyter-notebook
250+ Fine-tuning & RL Notebooks for text, vision, audio, embedding, TTS models.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wesm/pydata-book
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wesm/pydata-book
Language: jupyter-notebook
Materials and IPython notebooks for "Python for Data Analysis" by Wes McKinney, published by O'Reilly Media
